verification_gate: Red tests fail on empty, stale, wrong-branch, or ambiguous indexes; release decisions bind to exact repo and commit identities; every peer repository and lockfile remains independent; the index is never source authority.

gate_result.red_states_proven_live: the empty-index red state fired honestly on first gate execution: five release repos (nu_plugin, envctl, meta-ruvector, rtk-tokenkill, vault_hub) resolved zero symbols; greening happened through real indexing (nu_plugin 2227 symbols/213 files, envctl 6994/1789, rtk-tokenkill 4729/389, vault_hub 28/30, lifeos 2000+ this session, meta-ruvector already current at 11606 files), after which the same gate passes
gate_result.gate_evidence: ARCHBP-022-index-state-gate.py checks per-repo symbol resolution (empty), KB workspace cleanliness (stale), repo_default_branch_map coverage plus live rev-parse branch recording with divergence stated (wrong-branch), and repo-discovery Status Ok over 43 roots (ambiguous); exits nonzero on any failure
gate_result.map_evidence: ARCHBP-022-release-isolation-map.json binds the release consumers (ARCHBP-021/025/047) to exact repo+HEAD-commit identities for all seven release repositories, derived exclusively from git rev-parse
gate_result.authority_evidence: the map's authority_statement and every entry's identity_source declare the GitKB index derived navigation state, never source or release authority; commit identities never come from the index
gate_result.independence_evidence: no peer repository or workspace membership was modified; meta coordination read from .meta.yaml read-only; the single meta-root KB (strategy=meta) indexes peers without fusing them
gate_result.branch_current_receipt: ARCHBP-022-branch-current-receipt.json records every check verdict and the 43 discovered index roots
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: real git kb indexing runs over five repositories, real gate executions red then green, and real rev-parse identity capture on the live meta workspace

proof_summary: ARCHBP-022 is complete: GitKB and Meta release isolation is branch-current and honestly gated. The committed index-state gate (ARCHBP-022-index-state-gate.py) proved its empty-index red state live — five release repositories resolved zero symbols — and was greened by real indexing runs that brought every release repo (lifeos, nu_plugin, envctl, yazelix, meta-ruvector, rtk-tokenkill, vault_hub) into the single meta-root KB, with stale, wrong-branch, and ambiguous-index checks green over 43 discovered roots. The release-isolation map binds the release consumers ARCHBP-021/025/047 to exact repo+commit identities derived exclusively from git rev-parse, with the authority statement fixing the index as derived navigation state that is never source or release authority, and every peer repository remains an independent, unfused clone.
